fields.accident_circumstances:
Our Client Was Travelling Along The Main Road Behind The Third Party 2 Vehicle. FH61EDO Who Slowed Due To A Broken Down Vehicle On The Left Hand Side And Oncoming Vehicles. Our
Client Slowed , The Third Party Came From Behind, Hit Our Client In The Rear Which Shunted Our Client Into The Third Party 2 Vehicle. The Vehicle Front Reg: FH61EDO

fields.vehicle_model: Mercedes-Benz E 220 AMG LNE NGT ED PRM + D A
fields.accident_circumstances:
On April 15, 2026, I Was Traveling From Guildford To Gatwick. On The A3 - Junction 10 / Cobham - Wisley M25. There Are Two Lanes Allocated To Gatwick At Junction 10. At The Time Of The Incident,
I Was In The Right-hand Lane In The Direction Of Travel. I Also Note That There Are Three Traffic Lights In The Same Direction. After The Second Traffic Light Changed Color To Green, I Continued Moving Forward At A Speed Of Approximately 5 Miles / H Because
I Noticed That The Last Traffic Light Was Red. At That Moment, I Noticed That A Mini Van Appeared On My Left And Suddenly Entered In Front Of Me. My Only Reaction Was To Move My Car To The Right And Apply The Brakes. I Must Say That The Other Driver Not Only
Had A Much Higher Speed But Also Did Not Signal His Intention To Change Direction. If I Hadn't Had The Presence Of Mind To Pull The Steering Wheel To The Right And Apply The Brake, I Think The Damage Would Have Been Greater.
Our Client Stopped behind a Vehicle in traffic when tp reversed and hit Our Clients Vehicle on the Front Driverside he reversed as he went over the lane for opposite traffic

Pre-existing Damage:
Our client was proceeding in the in the
middle lane on Cobridge Road in Stoke on
Trent heading northbound and entered an
unnamed roundabout outside Suzuki Stoke
with the intention of taking the second exit
back onto Cobridge Road. This part of
Cobridge Road has three lanes for travel in
our client's direction and the roundabout
itself also has three lanes and four exits.
Your insured entered the roundabout next
to our client but in the right- hand lane and
merged into our client's lane, colliding with
the front offside of the vehicle, and pushing
our client into the curb, causing additional
damage to the front nearside of our client's
car.

fields.vehicle_model: ALFA ROMEO GIULIETTA LUSSO M-AIR TB S-A
fields.accident_circumstances:
– Undriveable
Pre-existing Damage:
Our client had exited a roundabout and was
proceeding along Brooke Lane in Newcastle
in the left-hand lane. Due to traffic
conditions, the client was then stationary for
approximately thirty seconds. This is an A-
type road with two lanes for travel in our
client's. Your insured, while driving in the
left-hand lane exited a roundabout and
proceeded behind our client, failing to
properly observe their surroundings. As a
result, they collided with the rear of our
client's vehicle, causing significant damage
to our client's car. Both parties exchanged
details at the scene.
